text: The dimly lit corridors and silent rooms fill me with a sense of anticipation and unease. Darkness drapes everything with mystery; every reflective surface seems to hint at hidden possibilities behind the glass. The stark light and emptiness invoke not only solitude, but also the potential for discovery—am I an intruder or a seeker here? Every echo, every faint light feels significant, as if the world itself holds its breath, watching to see what I will do next.
